title: Velvet Rope & Read Receipts
description: Juggle a gold-tie gala and a glitchy dating app by swiping between lanes and matching your vibe color to the only openings before both scenes shut you out.

howToPlayJson.title: Velvet Rope & Read Receipts
howToPlayJson.objective: Last through a 3-minute social spiral by switching between the Gala lane and Dating lane, passing matching gates, and timing commitment taps when one side suddenly becomes unavailable.

controls.outcome: Move between the Gala lane and the Dating lane to line up with incoming gates.
Toggle between Gold gala mode and Pink dating mode so your runner can pass matching gates.

controls.input: Hold for a brief moment when the spotlight appears
controls.outcome: Lock into the currently favored lane for a short burst, boosting score but making the other lane temporarily reject you.

steps: Start in the center as a guest bouncing between a ballroom entrance and a dating app feed.
Gold gates, pink chat arches, red rejections, and blue ghosting walls stream downward faster over time.
Swipe into the correct lane and tap to match the incoming gate color before contact.
Every few seconds, a Spotlight Choice twist fires: either the gala gets a VIP opening or the app shows a hot match.
Hold to commit to that side for 2 seconds; committed gates score double, but the opposite lane becomes blocked with rejection walls until it
Break your combo by hitting the wrong color, entering a blocked lane, or missing a gate; lose the run entirely after 3 heartbreak hits.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score 10 per clean gate, +1 combo multiplier every 5 perfect gates up to x5, and double points during Spotlight Choice commitments. Leaderboard score is total points before your third heartbreak.
tips: Pre-tap color swaps before swiping lanes so you solve two problems at once.
Use Spotlight Choice only if the boosted lane is already lined up; greedy commitments cause most losses.
Listen for the audio cues: a champagne chime means Gala is opening, and a notification ping means Dating is about to become the better risk.
